MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-29-2016 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-17-2015 Set For Trial On Mar-21-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-26-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: CROSS DEFENDANT KATHRYN SHAFFER'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for cross-complainant to allege compliance with CCP 411.35 (Certificate of Merit). Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Cross-Defendant's reliance on Weseloh Family Partnership v. K.L.Wesel Construction (2004) 125 Cal. App. 4th 152 is premature. Weleoh family Partnership is a summary judgment case, where the Court after lengthy discussion of Biakanja factors found no duty of care existed, and based on that finding determined that indemnity claim necessarily failed. Here, Plaintiff alleges a cause of action for negligence. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-28-2015 Continued To Jun-26-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CROSS DEFENDANT KATHRYN SHAFFER's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is continued to June 26, 2015. Moving and opposing parties are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and C and provide copies of their respective submissions in support of and in opposition to the demurrer to department 501 no later than May 29, 2015 by 4:00 p.m. The Court received 3 copies of the Notice of Demurrer. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported (D501)

No appearances.

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

CROSS DEFENDANT CITISCAPE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT GROUP LLC's MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT is DENIED. On an indemnity claim cross-complainant is entitled to recover attorney's fees for the underlying complaint by a third-party subject to limitations set forth in CCP 1021.6. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D501)
